name: The Great Game [TNO]
description:
[The New Order: Last Days of Europe scenario.]

The Long Struggle for Power.

For 20 years, the Greater German Reich lived in the glory and success of their victory in WW2. But it was far from being a stable peace. Several factions worked in the shadows to secure their position and take it all for themselves. After all, the darkness of the Reich was as big as the ambitions of its denizens.

Albert Speer's liberal reformists, Reinhard Heydrich's SS hardliners, Hermann Göring's Militarists, Martin Bormann's party loyalists, and.. you. The fifth contestant to the role of the Führer.

Who will emerge victorious, and lead Germany for years to come?

Set the max tokens to 0/unlimited, it's a lot of stuff to generate. Also you'll probably have to manually ask the bot to check the influence/power meters.
creator: SensouNoAkuma
